name: Nikolay
bio: Nikolay was a lead developer before moving on to the management side. Now he's not only a manager, running his team like clockwork but also a core member of our web development standards team and actively involved in training new developers.

name: Maria
bio: Maria specializes in complex CSS animations and responsive design. She's our go-to expert for challenging front-end implementations and has trained dozens of junior developers in modern HTML/CSS techniques.

name: Alex
bio: Alex leads our UI development team with a focus on performance and accessibility. He's passionate about creating pixel-perfect implementations that work flawlessly across all devices and browsers.
